query:
SELECT 'Sites' as entity, COUNT(*) as count FROM sites
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Vendors', COUNT(*) FROM vendors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Asset Categories', COUNT(*) FROM assetCategories
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Assets', COUNT(*) FROM assets
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Work Orders', COUNT(*) FROM workOrders
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Maintenance Schedules', COUNT(*) FROM maintenanceSchedules
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Financial Transactions', COUNT(*) FROM financialTransactions;
